free_text: Measurement of products in 17N breakup reaction
The purity, intensity and average energy in the center
position of target of 17N is 97%, 1E6 particles/s and
Au (621 mg/cm2 thick) and Be (370 mg/cm2 thick)
16 NE110 scintillators were set as E detector.
PPAC detector to confirm the incident beam
No information on the source of uncertainty
